description: Map-Reduce Pattern for Distributed Data Processing
explanation: Use this pattern when processing large datasets that can be split into independent chunks. Map phase processes chunks in parallel, reduce phase aggregates results. Ideal for batch jobs, ETL pipelines, and analytics workloads.
task_description: Optimize chain for processing large datasets efficiently

examples.description: Processing 10GB of server logs to extract error patterns
examples.result: Reduced processing time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
